name: RPlog_Beginning_Again
title: Beginning Again
summary: This wiki index page chronicles Lynae's transition into a new chapter of her life after winning a New Republic pardon and settling her outstanding debts, including a renewed life debt to Malign. Having closed out her Imperial naval career, she volunteers for the CDU Navy and reports to Captain Kimelea aboard the KOS, undergoing accelerated training and the Caspianization process that reshapes her from an Imperial officer into a CDU naval medical officer. The page links a sequence of associated logs documenting her surface training on Caspar and unexpected reunions with old colleagues and acquaintances. Entries such as Volunteering, What We Become, Come What May, Mutual Understanding, and The Price of Tea trace the personal and professional turns of her fresh start.
